bikes.description:
Troll mountain bike, with goofy gold+orange+black paint job, rear rack and two repairs on the frame. Stolen with a few other cycles from my garage on the south side of Bernal, San Francisco on the night of Wed Jan 8, 2020.

The top of the seat tube was recently repaired and is painted solid black. The rear rack eyelet at the top of the right seat stay has a repair which is highlighted in an old photo. The handlebar had little stubby GS3-L bar-ends. It has an aluminum bashguard carefully bolted to the big ring of a triple chain ring. It was a bit of a beast and I really liked it.
bikes.title: 2011 Surly Troll

bikes.description: 'Owl' water bottle holder

bikes.description:
Crimson bright red down hill mountain bike.

Front shocks and shock in center of frame just behind pedals.

Wide handle bars, gear shifts on right hand side.
bikes.title: 2017 Specialized Downhill

bikes.description: brown and black specialized cross trail  hybrid mountain bike.  Mud guard on back, left side of frame has paint worn off.
bikes.title: 2009 Specialized Cross Trail

bikes.description:
Pretty much out of the box Altitude C90 model, with Shimano XT all-mountain SPD/platform pedals (M785 Trail). Pedal arms have booties at the ends to protect them from smashing the ground, Rocky-provided frame protector was never installed (instead, the bike has a long length of clear plastic adhesive on the downtube), there's a small scratch/knick on the drive side of the seat tube near the bottom bracket from when I had a spare tube zip-tied to the frame, after-market Chromag Squarewave grips. Also has a black Marsh Guard front fender with teal lettering. 
Fork	Fox 36 Float EVOL FIT4 Factory 160mm
Shock	Fox Float DPX2 Factory
Headset	FSA Orbit NO.57E
Stem	Rocky Mountain 35 CNC
Handlebar	Race Face Next R 780mm
Grips	Chromag Squarewave (black)
Brakes	Sram Guide RSC 180mm
Brake Levers	Sram Guide RSC
Shifters	Sram X01 Eagle
Front Derailleur	Rocky Mountain Spirit Guide
Rear Derailleur	Sram X01 Eagle 12 spd
Cranks & Chainrings	Sram Descendant Carbon Eagle 34T
Pedals	Shimano XT M8120 SPD pedals
Cassette	Sram XG-1295 10-50T
Chain	Sram X01 Eagle
Front Hub	Rocky Mountain Sealed Boost 15mm
Rear Hub	DT Swiss 350 Boost 148mm
Rims	27.5" Stans Flow MK3 Tubeless Ready
Tires	Maxxis Minion DHF WT Maxx Terra 3C Tubeless Ready 27.5 x 2.5/Maxxis Minion DHR II WT Maxx Terra 3C Tubeless Ready 27.5 x 2.4
Seatpost	Fox Transfer Factory 30.9mm
bikes.title: 2018 Rocky Mountain Bicycles Altitude C90

bikes.description:
- Schwalbe Ice Siker pro winter studded tires
- 180mm Shimano XT Disc brakes
- 26" Mavic CrossRide wheelsets
- 9-speed drivetrain with 3 chainrings up front
- White & Red Easton aluminum frame with carbon rear seat stay/triangle.
- Scrape marks on the carbon rear arm on the non-drive side by the lower link point
- Fox Talas RL fork adjustable from 100-125-140mm
- Fox Float RP23, 4" - 5" adjustable travel
- Specialized bottle cage
- Raceface Atlas 785mm wide red 31.8mm handlebars (with white topographical doodles)
- ODI grips
bikes.title: 2007 Rocky Mountain Bicycles ETSX-50

bikes.description: It is a silver bike with black writing saying "quic" and "Cannondale" and has blue striping along small parts on the frame above the wheels. Has matte black mountain bike style handle bars. Has a white seat with "Cannondale" in black letters with a mud flap coming off the back of the seat. Also has "Si" in blue letters on the main frame below handle bars. Has a little scuffing on the second bar with "cannondale" on it. Has a black drink carrier on second botto3bar and also has a silver bell on left side and a black flashlight on the right handle bar.
bikes.title: 2018 Cannondale Mountain bike

bikes.description: It is a gray and black Huffy 29er Mountain bike. It has a headlight and a reflector attached to the handlebar and two tail light reflectors attached to the seat post. It has HUFFY on the side with black letters and has red lines. The wheels are black and thick with some silver in the rear wheel rim.
bikes.title: Huffy Kolo 29er (2900)

bikes.description:
8-Speed Mountain Bike, Disk Brakes, 27.5" Wheels.
White, Red and Black. Specialized Logo on Frame in Bright Orange/Pink.
bikes.title: 2016 Specialized Pitch 650b

bikes.description: It is a mountain bike with "horns" on each side of the handle bar, wide off-road wheels, burgundy/brown color with white "CANNONDALE" on the sides. It is also scratch on the side, which has left some white marks without erasing any of the logo. The pedals are for "click-in shoes" and not wide for normal shoes.
bikes.title: 2016 Cannondale CAD3

bikes.description:
I can name every single component on the bike, as it has many, many custom parts including: 
Engraved blue ODI/Straitline bicycle grips with "PHB" initialed on the inside grip ends. 
The bike has front and back fox suspension that have orange writingon them, with kashima coating, industry nine Front and Rear wheels, Maxxis Minion F+R tubeless tires, Shimano XTR rear deraileur and XTR clipless pedals, Raceface carbon cranks, with blue rubber raceface cranks guards, a 1X11 drive train, with an oval front chain ring, a KMC gold chain, a Thompson dropper post, paired with a Specialized carbon racing mountain seat, Shimano XT disc brakes, Renthal Carbon handle bars, and a paired renthal stem with carbon head tube spacers. Please help me find my bike! Thank you.
bikes.title: 2017 Santa Cruz Bronson

bikes.description: Khaki or tan, not Brown. 54 cm, 26" wheels, black handle bar tape, bar end shifters, rear Tubus Cargo Evo rack, orange Revelate Mountain Feed Bag on left side handlebar, 1 bottle cage, rear CyGo Lite blinky, Shimano clip/clipless metal pedals
bikes.title: 2016 Surly Long Haul Trucker

bikes.description: Army Cot green mountain bike with "CO-OP" logo, small (white) LED cube light mounted to front, small (red) LED cube light strapped to rear, and black Topeak MTX mounting rack over the rear tire (for quick release bag or basket).
bikes.title: 2017 REI DRT 1.2 Unisex Small

bikes.description:
I rode this bike across the US in support of Affordable Housing. It's my soulbike. 
It has a black frame with light blue trim. Brown bar tape that peeling off. Brooks saddle.
bikes.title: 2015 Giant Liv Avail

bikes.description: This bike setup is the "Race XT" version of the Mach 429 Trail. Frame has been covered in many places with helicopter tape for protection - rear triangle, under downtube, front of headtube. Has SG sticker on back of seat tube and a pinhole ding on the top tube. At time of theft, bike was set up with 27.5"+ wheels instead of the 29" wheels shown in the photos.
bikes.title: 2018 Pivot Mach 429 Trail

bikes.description: seat is torn on the left side and there are two scratches one on the body of the bike and the other on the back rim, right side of bike
bikes.title: 2016 Specialized Stumpjumper FSR comp carbon 29

bikes.description:
Disc brakes. Gold bell. Front and rear black fenders. Black water bottle holder. White scratch on metal of right handle bar and scuffed rubber on end of right
handle.
bikes.title: 2017 Rocky Mountain Bicycles Whistler 10

bikes.description: It’s at least 6 years old but in very good condition. There is a bell on the handlebar and a bracket on the other side (for a light that was not attached at time of theft). It’s a mountain bike but currently has tires that are more suitable for roads (smoother).
bikes.title: Giant Rincon Womens

bikes.description:
Green/black frame that looks like green leaves. It's a mountain bike - possibly steel or chromoly - on the heavier side. 

Includes: 2 black fenders (rubber bit was taken off the back fender); rear rack w/ spring clamp (black); bottle holder (black); right shimano shift gear (5); possibly new derailer; bullhorn handle bar (black); 2 metal silver pedals with black ridges; front tire - Schwalbe Delta Cruiser Plus; 15 speeds; small blue faded bungee cord to secure the back fender
bikes.title: Norco Bikes Cherokee

bikes.description:
Black Radio Valac
Chrome stem
Black odi rugged lock-on grips
Green Alienation front rim
Lime green 1664 magnesium pedals
United fat tripod seat on 1664 post
Silver Fit key 28t sprocket
1664 axle bolts
Front tire: Odyssey keyboard 2.35
Rear tire: Fit FAF 2.30
X-Wing figurine strapped to chrome stem
Trimmed rear fender
Mud runner on downtube
Carbon fiber headset spacer
KMC tough chain
Mirraco 175mm crank arms
Extra grip rubber strapped onto frame and crossbar for carrying
bikes.title: 2016 Radio Bike Co Valac

bikes.description: Pink, 90's hard tail mountain bike style, flat handlebars with brand spanking new ergo grips, white seat (Phorm brand) secured with chain, blackburn rear rack, no shocks, brake pads, bell on handlebars, water bottle basket, leather handle below water bottle cage, "ride a bike and get there free" sticker on crossbar.
bikes.title: 1988 Trek 900

bikes.description: Mostly red with Black Schwinn Mountain Bike. Was a birthday present in 2009, since then has had new metal bike pedals put on, holster for my bike lock on the side, as well as holsters for rear and forward facing lights.
bikes.title: 2009 Schwinn

bikes.description: The bike has a "country and town" back wheel because I replaced the mountain wheel tire. The handlebar to shift the gears with the right hand is partially broken, so one can see the red 'gears' on the handlebar. The seat is an ERGO seat and on the left side of the handlebar is a silver bell.
bikes.title: 2009 Schwinn Mountain

bikes.description: FX Alpha Hydroformed Aluminum
bikes.title: 2007 Trek 7.3 FX

bikes.description: 2017 Turquoise Yeti ASR mountain bike, size L, 29 inch wheels, maxxis tires, carbon frame, Fox front and rear suspension, Shimano XTR pedals, ESI dark grey foam grips, left grip is missing a chunk on the end. There's a Garmin mount on the right side of the handlebars. SRAM Eagle 12 speed XO1 gearing and SRAM Guide brakes. SRAM protective boots on the ends of the cranks around the pedals (not stock, not that common). 1 black water bottle cage. Specialized 143mm Power saddle, black (not pictured). Had extra tube taped below seat with electrical tape. Cadence meter on rear left chain stay and speedometer/odometer magnet on back wheel spoke. Might even still have a well worn Specialized saddle bag with red zipper pull on it. Stock w/ DT SWISS M1900 wheels and Race Face cockpit.
bikes.title: 2017 Yeti ASR

bikes.description: Neon Green Handle bar tape was just put on before stolen. There are some scratches on the top bar of the frame due to attaching a bike pump. There is also a small scratch or crack seen in the picture attached. The handle bars have been replaced and are smaller than the original. The stem was also replaced and is shorter. Neither are Specialized brand. The pedals on the bike were flat on one side and mountain clips on the other. The seat post has a number of scratches. Size is 50 or 51.
bikes.title: 2011 Specialized roubaix SL2

bikes.description: Black and Red mountain bike. Has green scratches on left side of main frame from locking on a green mount.
bikes.title: 2016 Specialized Hardrock
GT Bicycles Backwoods Sport Mountain Bike

bikes.description: Mountain bike with luggage carrier and U-lock with cable lock
bikes.title: 2017 Trek FX Charcoal-17.5

bikes.description: Bike is only a month old, has paint scratches throughout right side due to a crash, even handle bar is eroded on the right side has GT written in Teal on the lower cross beam, also it has neon green rims
bikes.title: 2017 GT Bicycles Mountain

bikes.description: Alpha™ Aluminum with a comfortable, upright riding position. Considered Mountain/Commuter/Comfort Bike.  Weighs approx 30 #s. Fork suspension w metal matrix comp rims. 50 mm rise. 7 speeds. Bonlager Tires 26x19.5. Suntour NEX200 48/38/28. Shimano ZH371334. Shifters: SRAM MRX Plus, Shimano CO51. RST CT COM 1 CL. Has 2 cupholders; a speedometer; a bell; a basket; a gel seat; side mirror; compass holder; integrated cable w/ lock.
bikes.title: 2003 Trek Navigator 200

bikes.description: Very well used bike, it has a black mountain man rear rack, a phone, bike light and GPS mount in the handlebar, a Novara bento box in the frame and a water cage with a Novara bottle in it. It was full when the bike got stolen. It had a white seat.
bikes.title: 2012 Novara Express XX

bikes.description:
a completely custom built single speed road bike, not technically fancy, but actually quite fancy. 
the two most unique things were an ideale type record 80 saddle that is quite worn, and actually custom punched and laced underneath, just above the rails. the second thing are the custom built cherry wood fenders. they are made locally by paul sykes and says "sykes" on the rear fender. they have leather arrow tip shaped mud flaps, and are only wide enough to accommodate up to 700c x 25 tires. 
the frame was unpainted and unfinished with a clear sealant. 
the wheel set is a black deep v origin8 single speed set with machined side walls.
the freewheel is white industries eno, 17 tooth if i remember correctly. 
the handlebars are soma condorina bars that look like cafe racer motorcycle bars. 
the grips are worn leather PDW (portland design works.
mountain style tektro break levers. 
the tires are red-walled continental vintage/classic or whatever term they used. 
there are black power grips on the pedals. 
there was a black minihaha brand saddle bag on the back of the saddle. 
black seatpost.  
black cable housing. 
black pedals. 
silver crank, silver origin8 48 tooth cog, i believe. 
the serial number will be under the bottom bracket, but i misplaced any pictures i'd previously taken of it.
bikes.title: Fuji

bikes.description: 2006 Lemond Poprad, Orange, with white Lemond Panels on seattube and downtube. 57cm. True Temper OX Platinum Steel tubing.Corrosion/rust on top tube cable guides, seattube and underside of bottom bracket.Vintage “Huffy” Headtube badge, glued to headtube.Labelmaker sticker “Pooprad” on drive side top tube.White Conduit Coffee sticker on drive side top tube near head tube.Shiny Gold “Tapeworm Time Trial” Sticker on drive side top tube.Easton EC70 cyclocross fork, White. Adorned with large TRP stickers.Pewter Chris King HeadsetMismatched Wheelset: Black Mavic Ksyrium Equipe Rear Wheel, Silver Mavic Ksyrium Elite front wheel, wheels have significant wear on the braking surface. Rear rim has several small dents, front rim has one small dent below the braking surface. Worn out Clement MXP 700x33 Tires.Shimano Ultegra 6600 Crankset Silver, with a black Spot Brand bash guard and a 39 tooth ultegra single chainring. Black Shimano Ultegra 6800 hollowtech II bottom bracket.  Black Plastic chain watcher on seat tube.Time ATAC Z downhill clipless pedals, Black.Black Sunline XC One Stem 90mm flipped at an upward angle, with one spacer below the stem, several spacers above the stem.White Specialized mountain bike riser bars with black specialized lock on grips with red lockrings.Red Anodized Avid Speed Dial levers, sun faded to pink,  with silver lever blades.Red Anodized TRP CX-9 mini v brake calipers with salmon brake pads.Shimano XT trigger shifter, 8 speed.Shimano XTR M900 8 speed rear derailleur, silver.Shimano XTR M900 11-32 8 speed cassette.Black Thomson Set Back SeatpostWhite Specialized Phenom 143 saddle, with red undershell.Black Elite waterbottle cage mounted on seattube.Also had a small Blackburn flashy rear light on the seatpost, and a Light and Motion Urban 350 headlight mounted on the handlebar.The included picture is accurate other than having drop bars, bike is now flatbarred.
bikes.title: 2006 LeMond Poprad

bikes.description: Women's with the seat all the way down. Similar to mountain bike, more like a crossover, not road tires. 19 or 20" tires, 18 speed. Had a speedometer/odometer and it had black handlebars.
bikes.title: Trek

bikes.description:
This is a grey Norco Sasquatch Hardtail Mountain Bike. It has an aftermarket black Axiom Titec Seat with red threading and and white and red logo stitched on the top of the seat. It has all black 6 inch Marzocci Drop-Off shocks in the front, 6 inch hayes disc brakes on the front and back and Sun Rim Single Track rims with dirt tires on it. 

Most notably, it was wired for a speedometer but there is no electronic piece attached on the handlebars, only a space for it to be locked in place. The cable for the speedometer goes down and around the brace on the front forks and then the sensor is ziptied onto the front fork on the right side.
bikes.title: 2006 Norco Bikes Sasquatch

bikes.description: Full rigid (no suspension) 80's mountain bike with very long chainstays; fork and frame have matching reddish orange paint. Markings: yellow "Finest Bicycles in the World" on chainstay and "Made in Japan" and rising sun logo on back of seatube. Dark anodized Specialized 26" rims, Shimano crankset with Biopace chainrings. Fat City handlebar. No front derailleur or shifter. Black colored Deore XT seatpost
bikes.title: 1985 Nashbar Terra XT
